CONTENT.Career: On 20 June 2022, after having played for Saint-Étienne for ten years, Hamouma joined newly-promoted Ligue 1 side Ajaccio.
CONTENT.Honours: Saint-ÉtienneCoupe de la Ligue: 2012–13Coupe de France runner-up: 2019–20
CONTENT.Personal life: Hamouma's paternal grandfather was from the Kabylie region of Algeria, and he has been approached to compete for the Algeria national team, but he has declined, saying that he "feels more French than Algerian".
CONTENT.External links: Romain Hamouma – French league stats at Ligue 1 – also available in FrenchRomain Hamouma career statistics at Topforward

SUMMARY: Romain Hamouma (born 29 March 1987) is a French former professional footballer who played as a winger.
